title: Multi-Server Deployment Configuration
description: Maps servers to the apps they should deploy. Used by dccd.sh -S <server>.

servers.description: Map of server names to their configuration. Each key is a server hostname.

description.description: Human-readable description of the server's purpose.

age_public_key.description: Age public key for SOPS encryption. The corresponding private key is stored on the server. Empty string means key not yet generated.

apps.description: List of app directory names under services/ to deploy on this server. Omit for servers that discover apps automatically (e.g. TrueNAS mode).

items.description: App directory name under services/ (lowercase, alphanumeric, hyphens).
